title: Custom 3D Swords
description: This TP Contains 3 Custom Swords That Looks Awesome. And This TP is inspired from glory smp.
body:
In This TP, There are 3 custom swords that looks awesome.

These texure will show when you change the name of any sword like if you want 1st sword(names are in the chanelogs description) so you will take any sword and name it then your texure will apppears.

BTW, I also have a discord server and a youtube channel so if you want any other version of my any creation so just contact me on my discord server.

[(Discord)](https://discord.gg/Qz3aEZ4PyK)

[(Youtube)](https://www.youtube.com/@itachisx7-official)

And Subscibe my channel pls if you want.    :)
